title: Square Heart
body:
![New](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ff0479cf4aacd4518db2672b6c25d1ba8f3e34b.png)
This is a smaller resource pack extracted from [my other pack](https://modrinth.com/project/5MsVUE4E), with some minor modifications. 

It features a theme centered around square-shaped hearts and satiety, and the experience bar has been modified. 

**For versions 1.21.9 and above, Appleskin textures are supported, as shown in the image above.**

Feedback：[https://forms.gle/vfNMyg4HZgxZsgFe9](https://forms.gle/vfNMyg4HZgxZsgFe9)
## 

這是一個從我的[另一個資源包](https://modrinth.com/project/5MsVUE4E)中獨立出來的一個較小的資源包，並進行一點簡單的修改。

以方形為主的愛心與飽食度作為主題，並且修改了經驗條。

**1.21.9 版本以上，支援 Appleskin 紋理。如上圖所示**

反饋：[https://forms.gle/vfNMyg4HZgxZsgFe9](https://forms.gle/vfNMyg4HZgxZsgFe9)
